interface: Cloud Storage JSON API v1 resumable uploads (uploadType=resumable)

headers.Content-Type: application/json; charset=UTF-8 (the body is object metadata, not object data)
headers.X-Upload-Content-Type: MIME type of the object data that will follow
headers.X-Upload-Content-Length: total object size in bytes, as a decimal string

initiate.response: 200 OK with a Location header carrying the session URI; the session URI's own query string must be preserved verbatim on every subsequent request; a session URI expires after one week

headers.Content-Range: bytes {first}-{last}/{total} — inclusive zero-based byte indexes over the whole object

chunks.chunk_size_rule: every chunk except the last must be a multiple of 256 KiB (262144 bytes); at least 8 MiB per chunk is the documented recommendation

responses.308: Resume Incomplete; the Range response header 'bytes=0-N' means bytes 0..N are persisted and the next chunk starts at N+1; a 308 without a Range header means nothing is persisted yet
responses.200_or_201: upload complete; the body is the finished object resource JSON

status_check.operation: PUT {session URI} with an empty body
status_check.responses: 308 + Range header = committed prefix; 308 without Range = nothing committed; 200/201 = upload already complete (body is the object resource)

session_errors.410: session URI invalid, upload less than a week old — start a new resumable upload from scratch
session_errors.404: session URI invalid, upload more than a week old — start a new resumable upload from scratch
session_errors.5xx: interruption; query the persisted offset with the status check and resume from there; already-persisted bytes cannot be overwritten

final_object_resource.generation: long, but serialized as a JSON STRING ('This property is a string formatted as the specified value type.')
final_object_resource.size: unsigned long, also serialized as a JSON STRING
final_object_resource.crc32c: CRC32c checksum, as described in RFC 4960, Appendix B; encoded using base64 in big-endian byte order
final_object_resource.md5Hash: MD5 hash of the data; encoded using base64

test_fixture_notes.token: dummy-gcs-token-8843 (dummy; must never appear in error text or reach a foreign host)
